channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A major milestone for developing a new spacesuit
item.description: Former NASA astronaut Danny Olivas tells me about Collins Aerospace's project to build a new spacesuit. The post A major milestone for developing a new spacesuit first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: CISA’s cyber incident reporting rules will apply to 316K entities
item.description: The cyber incident reporting regulations will apply to about 316,000 organizations in critical infrastructure, ranging from IT contractors to hospital systems. The post CISA’s cyber incident reporting rules will apply to 316K entities first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Why selling software to the government is like visiting a confessional booth
item.description: Final rules have kicked-in for companies selling software to the government. They must now attest to the fact that they used secure development practices. The post Why selling software to the government is like visiting a confessional booth first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: SEC tests insider-trading theory at trial of ex-Bay Area biotech executive
item.description: Securities traders and lawyers are closely watching the San Francisco case of Matthew Panuwat, the SEC’s first attempt to pursue so-called shadow trading.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple announces its annual developers conference is set for June 10
item.description: Although last year’s WWDC focused on the unveiling of the Vision Pro mixed reality headset, which launched in stores in February, this year is expected to turn to Apple’s AI efforts.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: 3 ways Apple’s monopoly lawsuit could change the iPhone experience for fans
item.description: The government's lawsuit provided a long list of how Apple has allegedly squashed competition with restrictive app store terms, high fees and its “walled-garden” approach, restricting how third-party companies interact with its brands and services.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News
